Special_Features: It is a safe and fast-acting antihistamine that does not cause sedation or interfere with memory. It acts as a long-acting, peripheral H1 receptor antagonist with reduced potential for adverse CNS effects.
Diseases_Used_For: Allergic rhinitis, chronic idiopathic urticaria, atopic eczema, contact dermatitis, and allergic reactions due to drugs and food.

Special_Features: Clindamycin is a semi-synthetic antibiotic effective against propionibacterium acne. Nicotinamide provides anti-inflammatory activity and reduces the number and severity of acne lesions.
Diseases_Used_For: Acne, pimples, bacterial skin infections, and moderate to severe facial acne vulgaris.

How_to_Use: Can be used as a makeup base or primer.
Special_Features: It acts as a 72-hour moisturizer that maintains moisture and balances the skin. It is a good moisturizer substitute for oily skin types.
Diseases_Used_For: Cures rash and irritation caused by insect or mosquito bites.

Drug_or_Content: White soft paraffin 13.2% w/w + Light liquid paraffin 10.2% w/w
Special_Features: Acts as a barrier cream and skin lubricant (emollient) to prevent water evaporation, keeping skin soft, smooth, and hydrated. It protects the skin from environmental and oxidative damage.
Diseases_Used_For: Senile pruritus, rough skin, dry skin (xerosis), atopic dermatitis, and general skin health maintenance.

Drug_or_Content: Red Onion Extract, Amla Extract, Brahmi Extract, Coconut Oil, Argan Oil, Bhringraj Oil, Rosemary Extract, Hibiscus Extract, Methi Extract, Kapur Kachri Extract, Sunflower Oil, Soya Bean Oil, Castor Oil, Olive Oil, Jojoba Extract, Lavender Extract
Special_Features: Checks hair fall, nourishes follicles, adds volume, stops breakage, and accelerates hair growth. It promotes a clean, healthy scalp and strengthens follicle roots.

How_to_Use: ABPA: 100 mg twice daily followed by once daily for 3-6 months. Blastomycosis/Histoplasmosis: 200 mg once daily for 6-8 months. Life-threatening situations: 200 mg three times daily for the first 3 days. Allergic fungal rhinosinusitis: 100 mg bid.
Special_Features: Highly effective in pulmonary fungal infections with high clinical cure rates (e.g., Histoplasmosis 95%).
Diseases_Used_For: Pulmonary fungal infections, Allergic Fungal Sinusitis, Histoplasmosis, Blastomycosis, Candidiasis, Mycosis, Cryptococcosis, Sporotrichosis, and Tinea Infections.

How_to_Use: 250mg once daily. Treatment duration varies from 2-6 weeks for Tinea pedis, to 12 weeks for toenail Onychomycosis.
Special_Features: An orally and topically active antimycotic agent with excellent fungicidal activity against dermatophytes, yeasts, and molds.
Diseases_Used_For: Fungal infections, dermatophyte onychomycosis, Tinea pedis, Tinea corporis, and Tinea cruris.

Special_Features: It is a long-acting, non-sedating tricyclic histamine antagonist that blocks histamine. It alleviates nasal and non-nasal symptoms and reduces the size and number of hives.
Diseases_Used_For: Allergic rhinitis, contact dermatitis, idiopathic chronic urticaria, and general allergic reactions.

Drug_or_Content: Kojic Acid Dipalmitate 2%, Alpha Arbutin 2%, Licorice Extract 1%, Chamomile Extract, Vitamin E
Special_Features: Fast-acting with a potent tyrosinase inhibition effect that is stronger than Hydroquinone without its pronounced side effects. It provides a 60% reduction in MASI score and significant skin lightening within 4 weeks.
Diseases_Used_For: Management of moderate to severe melasma, hyperpigmentation, and pre/post-chemical peeling.

Special_Features: Antifungal medication that aggressively fights fungus and yeast overgrowths.

How_to_Use: Apply to dry and affected areas of the scalp, keep overnight, and wash thoroughly the next morning.
Special_Features: Mainstay treatment for fungal conditions. Very effective against itching, dandruff, and dermatitis.
Diseases_Used_For: Tinea, Pruritus, Dandruff, Deep mycoses, Seborrheic dermatitis, recalcitrant dermatophytoses, Pityriasis versicolor, Athlete's foot, Ringworm, oral/esophageal candidiasis, and Jock itch.

Drug_or_Content: Betamethasone Dipropionate 0.05% w/w, Gentamycin 0.1% w/w & Zinc Sulphate 2.5% w/w
